ast.name: setDesc

ast.target: 此操作将清除日历选择器中已下载的日期。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: The username or API key is not configured in the settings.
ast.target: 设置中未配置用户名或 API 密钥。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Network error. See console for details.
ast.target: 网络错误。详情请查看控制台。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Upload URL not provided by server.
ast.target: 服务器未提供上传 URL。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Network error uploading file. See console.
ast.target: 上传文件时发生网络错误。请查看控制台。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Error: S3 keys not provided by server or invalid format.
ast.target: 错误：服务器未提供 S3 密钥或格式无效。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Network error downloading file content. See console.
ast.target: 下载文件内容时发生网络错误。请查看控制台。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: A date is required for this action.
ast.target: 此操作需要日期。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: The server did not provide bundles, or they are in an invalid format.
ast.target: 服务器未提供新闻包，或其格式无效。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 未选择任何文件。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Selected file is not named "my clippings.txt"
ast.target: 所选文件未命名为 \"my clippings.txt\"

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Error reading clippings file. See console for details.
ast.target: 读取剪辑文件时出错。详情请查看控制台。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: The username or API key is not configured in the plugin settings.
ast.target: 插件设置中未配置用户名或 API 密钥。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to get upload URL. Check console for details.
ast.target: 获取上传 URL 失败。详情请查看控制台。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: File upload failed. Check console for details.
ast.target: 文件上传失败。详情请查看控制台。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: An unexpected error occurred during upload. See console for details.
ast.target: 上传过程中发生意外错误。详情请查看控制台。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 开始下载 newslog 高亮内容...

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No highlighted articles found on the server.
ast.target: 服务器上未找到高亮文章。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: An unexpected error occurred during highlights download. See console for details.
ast.target: 下载高亮内容时发生意外错误。详情请查看控制台。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: An error occurred during the daily bundle download. See console for details.
ast.target: 下载每日新闻包时发生错误。详情请查看控制台。
